positive: A minimalist, stylized forest of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and abstract ferns, rendered in a high-contrast, neo-Art Nouveau style. The composition is symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, thick silhouettes of the flora against a deep midnight blue and emerald green background. Utilize geometric patterns derived from nature, incorporating negative space dynamically. The overall mood is mystical, ethereal, and serene. Studio quality print, vector art aesthetic, sharp details, cinematic lighting, highly decorative, suitable for apparel.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoon, messy, dirty, low detail, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, out of frame, excessive blur
